name: One-Click Degen Mode
description: Connect wallet, pick an agent, set max pain, and launch a capped watch, signal, or user-confirmed live degen agent.
degenPitch: Connect wallet. Pick agent. Set max pain. Let it cook.
whatItDoes: Creates a degen risk profile with ape budget, max pain, slippage, and kill switch rules.
Generates trade intents that require client-side wallet signing before live movement.
Binds paid actions and fee waterfalls into DNA x402 receipts.
cursorPrompt: Build One-Click Degen Mode with DNA x402. Connect wallet, pick an agent, set max pain, create trade intents, require client-side signing for live movement, show receipts, and never use backend custody or backend signing.
suggestedPrompt: Build One-Click Degen Mode with DNA x402. Connect wallet, pick an agent, set max pain, create trade intents, require client-side signing for live movement, show receipts, and never use backend custody or backend signing.
exampleFlow: Set ape budget and max pain
receiptProofBehavior: Receipt binds the risk profile hash.
Receipt binds fee waterfall and paid unlock metadata.
Live trade proof stays user-wallet signed.
